project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with TypeScript, Prisma ORM, SQLite database, shadcn/ui components
test_framework: No test framework configured - verification via npm run build
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify no TypeScript errors. The project does not have unit tests.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/dev.db is the SQLite database, generated by prisma db push. Prisma client is generated by npx prisma generate.
setup_instructions: npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push
environment_constraints: Node.js 22.22.3, npm 11.4.2. No Docker daemon available. Use host-based npm run build for verification.
contribution_requirements: Use Bahasa Indonesia for UI labels. Follow existing naming conventions. Ensure npm run build passes before submission. API routes use NextRequest/NextResponse pattern.
key_patterns: Agent guard files are in src/lib/agent-guard/ with export barrel in index.ts. API routes are at src/app/api/ using Next.js App Router. UI components use shadcn/ui with Card, Switch, Badge, Input patterns. Prisma schema uses SQLite with JSON stored as strings. The AgentGuardSettings component fetches from /api/pengaturan/agent-guard and sends PATCH requests.
directory_structure: src/app/(dashboard)/ - dashboard pages with route groups. src/app/api/ - API routes. src/lib/ - utility libraries including agent-guard/ and prisma.ts. src/components/ui/ - shadcn/ui components. prisma/ - schema and seed.
